message:
fix(tui): redact git commit count in history snapshots to prevent flaky tests

The history git mode snapshots included the actual commit count of the
bvr repository, causing them to fail after every new commit. Now
redacts "N/M correla" patterns to "N/N correla" before snapshot
comparison.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -82,7 +82,7 @@ c confidence >= 0% | v bead/git | / search | Tab mode | y copy | o open commit |
 bvr 1 Main b Board i Insights g Graph h History | mode=History ◉ Git | focus=list | issues=3/3 | filter=all | sort=defau
 ┌Commits [focus]───────────────────┐┌Related Beads───────────────────────────┐┌Commit Details──────────────────────────┐
 │                                  ││                                        ││                                        │
-│ Git commits (1/291 correlated) | ││ 1 related bead(s) for d50d5c0          ││ Commit 1/1 | confidence >= 0%          │
+│ Git commits (N/N correlated) | ││ 1 related bead(s) for d50d5c0          ││ Commit 1/1 | confidence >= 0%          │
 │ Min confidence: >= 0%            ││                                        ││                                        │
 │                                  ││   [o] B        Dependent               ││ COMMIT DETAILS:                        │
 │ > F d50d5c0 B        feat(tui):  ││                                        ││   SHA: d50d5c0d32fec65f6a66b9547eef6ee │

@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@ expression: text
 bvr 1 Main b Board i Insights h History | mode=History ◉ Git | focus=list | issues=3/3 | filter=all
 ┌Commits [focus]─────────────┐┌Related Beads────────────────────┐┌Commit Details───────────────────┐
 │                            ││                                 ││                                 │
-│ Git commits (1/291 correla ││ 1 related bead(s) for d50d5c0   ││ Commit 1/1 | confidence >= 0%   │
+│ Git commits (N/N correla ││ 1 related bead(s) for d50d5c0   ││ Commit 1/1 | confidence >= 0%   │
 │ Min confidence: >= 0%      ││                                 ││                                 │
 │                            ││   [o] B        Dependent        ││ COMMIT DETAILS:                 │
 │ > F d50d5c0 B        feat( ││                                 ││   SHA: d50d5c0d32fec65f6a66b954 │
